audit_items.proof_trace: The remote pointer is captured at L216 before close_and_free_server frees the server at L217; close_and_free_server/free_server never frees remote (only clears the back-reference remote->server=NULL), so remote remains valid for close_and_free_remote at L218. The cork_dllist_foreach_void macro pre-fetches _next before each body executes, so freed nodes never corrupt list traversal, and each server and its remote are freed exactly once.
